free_text: Absolute cross sections for proton-induced fission of
Uranium targets on either 20 microg/cm**2 carbon
400 mm**2 heavy ion detectors cooled to dry ice
Statistical uncertainty arbitrarily set for to 1%
the number of events, N(E), when N(E) > 10000.
When N(E) <10000 the uncertainty used was N(E)**1/2.
Anisotropy coefficients presented in Fig.3; derived
from fit to angular distribution data.
Converted from data set O0527 and O0701.
